overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from an open-world video game showing a character exploring a wet urban plaza on an overcast day. The character moves from a covered clothing market stall out into an open concrete plaza surrounded by modern high-rise buildings and other pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market stall with clothing displays

events.description: character turns away from clothing rack and begins walking away from the stall

agents.ego_description: standing near a clothing stall examining merchandise on display, then turns and begins walking away from the vendor

entered.detail: wooden awning providing shelter over the market stall
racks of hanging clothes and garments for sale
white mannequin torso displaying clothing near the stall entrance
stacked cardboard boxes on the ground near the stall
bright red kiosk structure with vendor standing inside
wide concrete staircase leading up to an upper plaza level
modern high-rise office building with reflective glass facade

segments.scene_description: The character stands under a covered market awning examining clothing items on display racks and a mannequin. The wet concrete plaza extends ahead toward a tall glass building and concrete stairs, with a red food kiosk visible to the right. The character then turns and begins walking away from the stall into the open area.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with stairway access

events.description: exits covered market stall area into the open wet plaza
continues walking straight through plaza while passing other pedestrians

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the wet open plaza away from the market stalls toward the central stairway

notable_agents.action: male pedestrian in light clothing walking toward the camera across the plaza

entered.detail: wall with illuminated digital displays and advertisements

segments.scene_description: The character moves from the sheltered market into the open plaza, revealing the full expanse of the wet concrete ground and overcast sky above. A digital advertising wall becomes visible on the left while the red food kiosk recedes into the background. The character continues walking toward the distant concrete stairs as other pedestrians move through the area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the sheltered intimacy of a market stall into the vast, open expanse of a wet urban plaza. It begins under a covered awning where the character examines clothing racks and a mannequin, with the gray concrete of the plaza stretching ahead toward a tall glass building. As the character turns and walks away from the stall, the shelter gives way to the open air, revealing a wide view of the overcast sky and the glistening, rain-slicked ground. The scene then expands to show a digital advertising wall on the left while the red food kiosk recedes into the distance. Finally, the camera continues its forward momentum through a crowd of pedestrians, heading toward a set of distant concrete stairs.
